async def verifylogic_cmd(update, context):
 await update.message.reply_text("✅ /verifylogic command working from AutoPilot Hub!")

app.add_handler(CommandHandler("verifylogic", verifylogic_cmd))

app.run_polling(drop_pending_updates=True)
risk: Low - The patch introduces a new command without altering existing functionalities.
